theorem: Plane Jacobian Conjecture for total degree <= 3 (normal form)
classical_reduction: Any plane Keller map of deg<=3 reduces by affine changes of domain/codomain to normal form F=(x+A,y+B) with A,B in (x,y)^2 and det JF=1 (van den Essen 2000, Ch.10).
status: PROVED for deg<=3 over Q in normal form; box+families machine-checked
